title: Repoint the MCP face onto recall/profile/map
userStory: As a Claude Code user, I want the brain's MCP face to expose the new recall/profile/map so that I can read the document-substrate brain from my editor.
acceptanceCriteria: The /mcp face exposes tools backed by the new pgvector recall/profile/map; no graphiti references remain in the MCP layer
The MCP tool schemas match the new Chunk / Context shapes
Verify: an MCP call to recall from a client returns the same result as the HTTP /recall endpoint for the same query and scope
